review_title: A little bit of everything for your P.C.
description: The majority of my business is on the computer, and if my computer is running fast, and with no errors that my job get exponentially easier. I love Glary Utilities, I use them at home, in the office, I would use them on Android if I could.
author: Andrew B.
pros: Minus an antivirus Glary utilities does just about everything your computer needs to run efficiently. 8 especially like the startup tool that even covers windows programs.
cons: A great product that does a lot, but aesthetically it's not the most beautiful program I've ever seen, but then again it doesn't need to be.

review_title: Glary Uitilities: un excellent utilitaire tout-en-un!
description: Glary Utilities est une suite logicielle puissante Il offre de nombreuses fonctionnalités haut de gamme pour maintenir votre système en bon état. Grâce à la fonctionnalité "Maintenance en 1 clic", votre ordinateur sera plus rapide et plus propre!
author: Andry C.
pros: Glary utilities est un logiciel de maintenance système qui propose un ensemble d'outils haut de gamme visant à améliorer les performances, la stabilité et la sécurité de l'ordinateur tel que le nettoyage du registre, nettoyage du disque, analyse de sécurité, optimisation de démarrage, gestionnaire de désinstallation, fragmentation du disque et du registre, …
cons: Les fonctionnalités avancées ne sont disponible que sur les versions payantes Pro ou Technician.

author: Ibraheem U.
pros: Its very user friendly and understandable even by a new user
cons: More should be done on purchase method .

review_title: Easy security at the Palm of your Hands
description: Its one of the best security organizations
author: Cheryl R.
pros: It tells you if there is a threat before you go to a website.
cons: You have to pay for real time protection but it is not much.

description: In my overall experience with Glary Utilities, I found it to be a reliable and effective suite of tools for optimizing and maintaining my computer's performance. The software provided a convenient one-stop solution for various system maintenance tasks, and the results were noticeable in terms of improved speed and responsiveness. With some minor refinements in the installation process, Glary Utilities could offer an even smoother user experience.
author: Piotr T.
pros: One of the standout features of Glary Utilities that I appreciated the most was its comprehensive system optimization capabilities. It offered a range of tools to clean up and optimize my computer's performance, such as disk cleanup, registry repair, and startup manager. This allowed me to keep my system running smoothly and efficiently.
cons: One aspect that I found slightly disappointing about Glary Utilities was the presence of additional bundled software during the installation process. Although it could be deselected, it would have been more convenient to have a clearer option to opt out from these additional installations.

description: Overall, my experience with Glary Utilities has been positive. It's a reliable and effective software for optimizing and maintaining my computer. The interface is user-friendly, and the one-click maintenance feature makes it easy to quickly clean up my system. While some of the advanced features require a subscription, the free version still offers a lot of useful tools that can improve system performance.
author: Marek T.
pros: I like how Glary Utilities offers a variety of useful system tools in one place. It's easy to use and helps to optimize and clean up my computer to keep it running smoothly. The one-click maintenance feature is especially convenient and effective.
cons: The free version of Glary Utilities can be quite limited in terms of functionality compared to the paid version. Some of the advanced features are only available with a subscription, which can be a downside for those who are on a tight budget.

description: I have been using it for a long time and have never had any problems, it is useful for every computer to have the entire operating system under control and deal with all possible problems
author: Luigi R.
pros: it is a software that is used to manage your PC, it allows you to clean the entire system, uninstall programs, correct errors in the system, and much more, I believe it is essential for all computers
cons: software that should be revised in graphics

review_title: Long-time Glary Utilities User and Fan
author: William C.
pros: Glary Utilities is an old stand-by for myself and my clients. It's proven to be one of those things a system admin keeps in their toolbox because it just works.
cons: Some features added over the years seem a bit superfluous, as they have become incorporated into other software, but Glary is still my go to for specialized functions.

review_title: One-click maintenance how its meant to be
description: Happy with my purchase will continue subscribing.
author: Ivan N.
pros: Very lightweight utility software that provides a wide array of tools to diagnose, clean, and keep your system optimized. Easy to use, works great.
cons: None that affect the functionality of it - I wish there were nicer skins but that's hardly a con.

description: With this program I have no more problems with the computer and its performance, defragmentation is faster than the one in Windows, additionally there is also a registry defragmentation, this program is like a toolbox everything is in 1 place you do not need additional programs so I recommend this program I use it already for the few years.
author: Krzysztof K.
pros: This multitool for a computer has a lot of tools to optimize and improve performance, the most I like is the button that fixes everything with 1 click, cleans the registry, fixes the disk from errors, removes history and temporary files
cons: Design could be more modern, but that's not a disadvantage.

description: En nuestro equipo consideramos que Glary es una herramienta útil y confiable para el mantenimiento y la optimización del sistema, aunque es importante utilizarla con precaución y estar al tanto de las posibles limitaciones y desventajas del software.
author: hugo V.
pros: Lo mejor de Glary Utilities es su amplia gama de herramientas para el mantenimiento y optimización del sistema, lo que permite a los usuarios solucionar problemas comunes de manera efectiva y mejorar el rendimiento de sus computadoras. Las funciones de limpieza de disco y registro, el administrador de programas y el desinstalador, la eliminación segura de archivos y la protección de la privacidad son solo algunas de las herramientas útiles que se ofrecen en Glary Utilities. Además, la interfaz de usuario intuitiva y la posibilidad de programar tareas de mantenimiento automatizadas hacen que sea una excelente opción para usuarios de todos los niveles de experiencia en informática.
cons: En mi caso la eliminación de archivos duplicados y la desfragmentación del registro, pueden llevar mucho tiempo para completarse,

review_title: Glary Utilities pour un PC Performant
author: Houenagnon Jules Vitale H.
pros: Je n'ai pas encore vu jusqu'à présent un logiciel d'optimisation de PC aussi plus performant et avec plus de fonctionnalités que Glary utilities. Son interface conviviale rend la tâche facile, et les nombreuses fonctionnalités de nettoyage, de défragmentation et de gestion des applications ont grandement amélioré la vitesse de mon PC. Encore, depuis que je suis passé à la version premium, j'ai accès à d'autres fonctionnalités plus avancées et mon PC est maintenant incroyablement réactif et léger, ce qui me comble de satisfaction.
cons: Ce que je trouve comme inconvénients avec Glary Utilities, c'est parfois la limitation de plusieurs fonctionnalités dans la version gratuite, mais c'est normal, moi, j'utilise le premium donc c'est bon à mon niveau.

author: Paulette H.
pros: Avoir un ordinateur bien optimisé rend le travail plus facile donc parmi tant de logiciel qui font cela, Glary Utilities est le logiciel que je trouve ultra puissant pour l'optimisation de mon pc. Il est doté de fonctionnalités qui analyse approfondie et nettoye le pc complet en un seul clic et le rend plus performant et très rapide pour utilisation.
cons: Nous n'avons pas encore d'inconvénients avec logiciel depuis des mois que moi et mon équipe utilise la version pro

review_title: Fondamentale per la ottimizzazione del proprio pc
description: Usato tutti i giorni per pulire e ottimizzare il pc
author: Christian O.
pros: Tante funzionalità, la possibilità di pulire il PC, riparare errori del registro, frammentare i file nel disco...
cons: Non ho ancora trovato un punti negativi, il software ha sempre funzionato bene e non mi ha mai dato problemi

description: Se solucionó problemas de lentitud en los ordenadores por diversas causas.
author: Marlon Deivy M.
pros: Suite muy completa para mantenimiento al sistema. Liviano. Actualizaciónes constantemente.
cons: Podría mejorar el acualizador de aplicaciones y drivers.

review_title: Interesante herramienta para optimizar tu Equipo
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tiene una interface muy sencilla que te permite resolver de manera ágil algunos problemas del rendimiento de tu PC como eliminar archvios temporales, diagnosticar problemas de velocidad del equipo, realiar copias de seguridad, administrar la utilización del disco, entre otras.
cons: En mi experencia personal me pareció un poco lento y repite las características de otras aplicaciones similares sin innovar en nada.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
